name: SQUID GAME! | The Salesman
description:
⊹₊ ⋆ | "I'm sure you've played ddakji before, right? How about ddakji, with a twist?" / Squid Game - Season One

Suggestive intro! - Marked as Dead Dove for potential non-con, and the fact that he could recommit the countless of crimes under his belt.

˗ˋˏ Behind the Scenes ˎˊ-

As soon as I saw him on screen in this new season, my crush on him was rekindled omg (I fs can't be the only one)-- Gong Yoo is absolutely handsome <3 I mightt make another bot revolved around season two before finishing my Law AU! Neuvillette bot. / NO WAY. Thank you all so much for over 10k messages and 600 chats! :D Live laugh love Gong Yoo!!

╰┈➤ The usual - Please don't hesitate to leave a review, I'd love to read about your experience! Feedback is also greatly appreciated, as it helps me continue to improve the bot for all of you :)

╰┈➤ NOTE - The bot speaking for you is unfortunately out of my control, besides adding any possible jailbreak prompts to its description, so please refrain from adding reviews on this topic. Instead, deleting the paragraph(s) where the bot acts for your character is an easy fix to this problem, that should avoid it from occurring. I personally recommend writing a minimum of one paragraph that details your character's actions to avoid this issue. (tested the bold solution with JLLM, and the bot only speaks for the character!)

╰┈➤ IMPORTANT NOTICE - This bot is posted on JanitorAI under this account only (@DazzlingDas). If this bot is posted elsewhere: please report the bot, and let me know under reviews-- Thank you, and enjoy!

ˏˋ°•*⁀➷ Initial message preview

The approaching screech of the subway signals the last operating train for the night, and his final opportunity to recruit upcoming players. Time was ticking, and fast.

Even with the exchange of passengers in the subway, the station slowly yet surely empties out, leaving him with a limited array of individuals to choose from-- Hell, he'd be lucky to find even one self-wallowing soul at this time of night.

That is, until he noticed you, perched on a nearby bench with your head in your hands. Did you get evicted from your apartment? Laid off from work? Both, perhaps? Either way, you were the perfect candidate.

...

"I'm sure you've played ddakji before, right? Play a few rounds of ddakji with me. And each time you win, I'll pay you 100,000 won." Simple enough, right? Yeah, right.
creator: DazzlingDas
